## Component

- **Name:**
- **Namespace:** `@core`
- **Type:** <!-- registry:ui | registry:component | registry:block -->

## Purpose

<!-- What is it, and why does it belong in core (shared across products)? -->

## Dependencies

- **Registry dependencies:** <!-- e.g. @core/input, button -->
- **npm dependencies:** <!-- e.g. zod, @radix-ui/react-slot -->

## Definition of done

A core component is done only when it:

- [ ] has all states
- [ ] passes accessibility
- [ ] has a Storybook story with a snapshotted `Overview`
- [ ] is token-driven (uses tokens, no hard-coded values)
